name: Powdery Mildew
description: A fungal disease that affects many plants, causing white powdery spots on leaves.
disclaimer: For severe cases, consult a plant pathologist.

name: Spider Mites
description: Tiny pests that damage plant leaves by feeding on sap.
remedies: Wipe leaves with a damp cloth
Spray with water to dislodge mites
disclaimer: For infestations, consider professional pest control.
